# 'weight_decay': 1e-06
# 'nhid': 32
# 'nbatch': 16
# 'epochs': 200000
# 'start_reduce': 100000
# 'radius': 0.35

# 'n_projections': 15
52 #d, the number of dimensions
128 #n, the number of points
